texto: Don't wait to forgive until you feel like forgiving
autor: you will never get there. Feelings take time to heal after the choice to forgive is made.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a you will never get there. Feelings take time to heal after the choice to forgive is made.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Don't wait to forgive until you feel like forgiving” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, neil-t-anderson, forgive pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
